character.name: 7 year old child adventurer, small brave girl, solarpunk fantasy world, oversized leather sword on back almost too big for her, hand-me-down leather armor wrapped with trained vines that are slightly too loose, long braided hair with small wildflowers and vine threads woven into the braids, determined expression on a young face, seed pouch belt, worn bark-and-leather boots, short tattered plant-fiber cloak dragging slightly on the ground, small hands gripping sword handle made of living root, warm brown and forest green palette, hand-painted storybook illustration style, full body character design, strong readable silhouette, the feeling of a child on a big adventure, clean background max canvas 104x104
